wheat.nutrition:
🌾 *Wheat Nutrition Recommendations*

✅ *At Sowing:*
• DAP: 50 kg/acre
• MOP: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing (21-25 days):*
• Urea: 25 kg/acre

✅ *Second Top Dressing (45 days):*
• Urea: 25 kg/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg Nitro-Plus

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.deficiency:
🌾 *Common Wheat Deficiencies*

🟡 *Yellow leaves = Nitrogen deficiency*
→ Apply Urea @ 25 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Nitro-Plus*

🟡 *Lower leaf yellow = Magnesium deficiency*
→ Spray MgSO4 @ 1% solution
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Mag-Rich*

🟡 *Slow growth = Zinc deficiency*
→ Apply ZnSO4 @ 10 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Zinc-Max*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.insecticide:
🌾 *Wheat Insecticide Recommendations*

🐛 *Aphids:*
→ Spray Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.5ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *AphidKill*

🐛 *Army Worm:*
→ Spray Chlorpyriphos 20 EC @ 2ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *PestGuard*

🐛 *Termites:*
→ Drench with Chlorpyriphos @ 3ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *TermiStop*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.weedicide:
🌾 *Wheat Weedicide Recommendations*

🌿 *Narrow leaf weeds:*
→ Clodinafop Propargyl 15 WP @ 160g/acre
→ Apply 30-35 days after sowing

🌿 *Broad leaf weeds:*
→ 2,4-D Amine Salt @ 500ml/acre
→ Apply 25-30 days after sowing

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg WeedClear

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
wheat.fungicide:
🌾 *Wheat Fungicide Recommendations*

🍄 *Yellow/Brown Rust:*
→ Propiconazole 25 EC @ 1ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *FungiShield*

🍄 *Powdery Mildew:*
→ Tebuconazole 25.9 EC @ 1ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *RustGuard*

⏰ _Spray at first sign of disease_

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

rice.nutrition:
🌾 *Rice Nutrition Recommendations*

✅ *At Transplanting:*
• DAP: 35 kg/acre
• MOP: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing 1 (21 days):*
• Urea: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing 2 (45 days):*
• Urea: 20 kg/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg Rice Kit

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.deficiency:
🌾 *Common Rice Deficiencies*

🟡 *Yellowing = Iron/Nitrogen deficiency*
→ Spray Ferrous Sulphate @ 0.5%
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Iron-Rich*

🟡 *Purple leaves = Phosphorus deficiency*
→ Apply DAP @ 10 kg/acre

🟡 *White tips = Zinc deficiency*
→ Apply ZnSO4 @ 10 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Zinc-Max*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.insecticide:
🌾 *Rice Insecticide Recommendations*

🐛 *Brown Plant Hopper:*
→ Buprofezin 25 SC @ 1ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *HopperStop*

🐛 *Stem Borer:*
→ Chlorpyriphos 20 EC @ 2ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *PestGuard*

🐛 *Leaf Folder:*
→ Emamectin Benzoate @ 0.4g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *BollGuard*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.weedicide:
🌾 *Rice Weedicide Recommendations*

🌿 *Early weeds (0-3 days after transplant):*
→ Pretilachlor 50 EC @ 500ml/acre

🌿 *Mixed weeds (15-20 days):*
→ Bispyribac Sodium @ 100ml/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg WeedClear

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
rice.fungicide:
🌾 *Rice Fungicide Recommendations*

🍄 *Blast Disease:*
→ Tricyclazole 75 WP @ 0.6g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *BlastShield*

🍄 *Sheath Blight:*
→ Hexaconazole 5 EC @ 2ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *FungiShield*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

cotton.nutrition:
🌾 *Cotton Nutrition Recommendations*

✅ *At Sowing:*
• DAP: 40 kg/acre
• MOP: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing 1 (30 days):*
• Urea: 20 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing 2 (60 days):*
• Urea: 20 kg/acre
• SOP: 10 kg/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg Cotton Kit

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
cotton.deficiency:
🌾 *Common Cotton Deficiencies*

🟡 *Yellow leaves = Nitrogen deficiency*
→ Apply Urea @ 20 kg/acre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Nitro-Plus*

🟡 *Red/Purple leaves = Phosphorus deficiency*
→ Apply DAP @ 15 kg/acre

🟡 *Leaf curl = Magnesium deficiency*
→ Spray MgSO4 @ 1% solution
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Mag-Rich*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
cotton.insecticide:
🌾 *Cotton Insecticide Recommendations*

🐛 *Bollworm:*
→ Emamectin Benzoate @ 0.4g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *BollGuard*

🐛 *Whitefly:*
→ Diafenthiuron 50 WP @ 1g/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *WhiteKill*

🐛 *Aphids:*
→ Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.5ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *AphidKill*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
cotton.weedicide:
🌾 *Cotton Weedicide Recommendations*

🌿 *Pre-emergence (0-3 days after sowing):*
→ Pendimethalin 30 EC @ 1 litre/acre

🌿 *Post-emergence (15-20 days):*
→ Quizalofop Ethyl @ 400ml/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg WeedClear

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
cotton.fungicide:
🌾 *Cotton Fungicide Recommendations*

🍄 *Root Rot:*
→ Carbendazim @ 1g/litre (soil drench)
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *FungiShield*

🍄 *Alternaria Leaf Spot:*
→ Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2.5g/litre

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX

tomato.nutrition:
🍅 *Tomato Nutrition Recommendations*

✅ *At Transplanting:*
• DAP: 30 kg/acre
• MOP: 15 kg/acre

✅ *Top Dressing (30 days):*

✅ *At Fruiting:*
• SOP: 10 kg/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg Nitro-Plus

tomato.deficiency:
🍅 *Common Tomato Deficiencies*

🟡 *Yellow leaves = Nitrogen/Iron deficiency*
→ Spray Ferrous Sulphate @ 0.5%
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *Iron-Rich*

🟡 *Blossom end rot = Calcium deficiency*
→ Spray Calcium Nitrate @ 1%

🟡 *Purple leaves = Phosphorus deficiency*
→ Apply DAP @ 10 kg/acre

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
tomato.insecticide:
🍅 *Tomato Insecticide Recommendations*

🐛 *Fruit Borer:*
→ Spinosad @ 0.3ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *PestGuard*

🐛 *Whitefly:*
→ Imidacloprid @ 0.5ml/litre
→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *WhiteKill*

🐛 *Mites:*
→ Abamectin @ 0.5ml/litre

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
tomato.weedicide:
🍅 *Tomato Weedicide Recommendations*

🌿 *Pre-emergence:*
→ Metribuzin 70 WP @ 200g/acre

👉 *Recommended:* MASCO NuAg WeedClear

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
tomato.fungicide:
🍅 *Tomato Fungicide Recommendations*

🍄 *Early Blight:*

→ Recommended: MASCO NuAg *FungiShield*

🍄 *Late Blight:*

📞 *Helpline:* 1800-XXX-XXXX
